title: Well-designed seqnum fix: checked_add + Result API
description:
Location: rust/lichen-oscore/src/seqnum.rs:68-70, 83-88
What: The fix properly uses checked_add() and returns Result<Self, SeqExhausted> instead of the previous wrapping_add() with debug_assert. The From<SeqExhausted> for OscoreError conversion integrates cleanly with ?.
Why it's good: This is the right design - silent wrap-around is a security violation, so the API forces callers to handle exhaustion. SECURITY comments document the invariant.
close_reason: Review finding - design is correct (checked_add + Result API is the right pattern for seqnum overflow)
